ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "chest_min" REAL /* Minimum chest measurement in cm */,
  "chest_max" REAL /* Maximum chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip_min" REAL /* Minimum hip measurement in cm */,
  "hip_max" REAL /* Maximum hip measurement in cm */,
  "french_size" INTEGER /* French size equivalent */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_translations" (
  "size_translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size translation */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Translated size name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in kg */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the customer (e.g., slim, average, athletic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_translations" (
  "product_translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product translation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Translated product description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_translation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the variant is stored */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the variant */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the movement */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., stock in, stock out, stock transfer) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel of the sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Comfort rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "product_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for product quality (1-5) */,
  "price_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for price (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
